trans-unit.source: The argument cannot be null or empty.
trans-unit.target: The argument cannot be null or empty.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' cannot be used in conjunction with other values.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' cannot be used in conjunction with other values.

trans-unit.source: Client certificate configured for the package source '{0}' was successfully added.
trans-unit.target: Client certificate configured for the package source '{0}' was successfully added.

trans-unit.source: Client certificate configured for the package source '{0}' was successfully removed.
trans-unit.target: Client certificate configured for the package source '{0}' was successfully removed.

trans-unit.source: Client certificate configured for the package source '{0}' was successfully updated.
trans-unit.target: Client certificate configured for the package source '{0}' was successfully updated.

trans-unit.source: {0}File path: {1}
trans-unit.target: {0}File path: {1}

trans-unit.source: {0}Password: -
trans-unit.target: {0}Password: -

trans-unit.source: {0}Password: ****
trans-unit.target: {0}Password: ****

trans-unit.source: {0}Certificates status: {1}
trans-unit.target: {0}Certificates status: {1}

trans-unit.source: {0}Certificate: {1}
trans-unit.target: {0}Certificate: {1}

trans-unit.note: 0 - default indentation 1 - package source name 2 - client certificate source type

trans-unit.source: {0}Find by: {1}
trans-unit.target: {0}Find by: {1}

trans-unit.source: {0}Find value: {1}
trans-unit.target: {0}Find value: {1}

trans-unit.source: {0}Store location: {1}
trans-unit.target: {0}Store location: {1}

trans-unit.source: {0}Store name: {1}
trans-unit.target: {0}Store name: {1}

trans-unit.source: Unable to add trusted author. The package is not author signed.
trans-unit.target: Unable to add trusted author. The package is not author signed.

trans-unit.source: Cannot find version of msbuild.
trans-unit.target: Cannot find version of msbuild.

trans-unit.source: Trusted owners are not supported in trusted author items.
trans-unit.target: Trusted owners are not supported in trusted author items.

trans-unit.source: The following PackageVersion items cannot specify a floating version: {0}. For more information on how to enable this functionality for projects using Central Package Management, visit https://aka.ms/nu1011
trans-unit.target: The following PackageVersion items cannot specify a floating version: {0}. For more information on how to enable this functionality for projects using Central Package Management, visit https://aka.ms/nu1011
trans-unit.note: 0 - The comma delimited list of package names that specified a floating version. Do not localize `PackageVersion`

trans-unit.source: The following PackageReference items are implicitly defined and cannot define a PackageVersion item: {0}. Projects using Central Package Management require that implicit package versions be specified by the PackageReference item. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/sdkimplicitrefs
trans-unit.target: The following PackageReference items are implicitly defined and cannot define a PackageVersion item: {0}. Projects using Central Package Management require that implicit package versions be specified by the PackageReference item. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/sdkimplicitrefs
trans-unit.note: 0 - Comma delimited list of the package IDs that were implicitly defined and should not have a PackageVersion item Do not localize `PackageReference` Do not localize `PackageVersion`

trans-unit.source: The following PackageReference items do not define a corresponding PackageVersion item: {0}. Projects using Central Package Management must declare PackageReference and PackageVersion items with matching names. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/nuget/cpm/gettingstarted
trans-unit.target: The following PackageReference items do not define a corresponding PackageVersion item: {0}. Projects using Central Package Management must declare PackageReference and PackageVersion items with matching names. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/nuget/cpm/gettingstarted
trans-unit.note: 0 - The comma delimited list of package names that did not have a version specified. Do not localize `PackageReference` Do not localize `PackageVersion`

trans-unit.source: The following PackageReference items cannot define a value for Version: {0}. Projects using Central Package Management must define a Version value on a PackageVersion item. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/nuget/cpm/gettingstarted
trans-unit.target: The following PackageReference items cannot define a value for Version: {0}. Projects using Central Package Management must define a Version value on a PackageVersion item. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/nuget/cpm/gettingstarted
trans-unit.note: 0 - Comma delimited list of the package IDs that specified a Version Do not localize `PackageReference` Do not localize `PackageVersion`

trans-unit.source: The following PackageReference items cannot specify a value for VersionOverride: {0}. Projects using Central Package Management are currently configured to disable this functionality. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/nuget/cpm/versionoverride
trans-unit.target: The following PackageReference items cannot specify a value for VersionOverride: {0}. Projects using Central Package Management are currently configured to disable this functionality. For more information, visit https://aka.ms/nuget/cpm/versionoverride
trans-unit.note: 0 - The comma delimited list of package names that specified a value for VersionOverride. Do not localize `PackageReference` Do not localize `VersionOverride`

trans-unit.source: Client certificate configured for the package source '{0}' already exists.
trans-unit.target: Client certificate configured for the package source '{0}' already exists.

trans-unit.source: Client certificate configured for the package source '{0}' does not exist
trans-unit.target: Client certificate configured for the package source '{0}' does not exist

trans-unit.target: Client certificate configured for the package source '{0}' cannot be modified due to a type mismatch.

trans-unit.source: Client certificates were not found.
trans-unit.target: Client certificates were not found.

trans-unit.source: Could not add the trusted signer: {0}

trans-unit.target: Could not list the trusted signers: {0}

trans-unit.target: Could not remove the trusted signer: {0}

trans-unit.source: Could not sync the trusted repository: {0}
trans-unit.target: Could not sync the trusted repository: {0}

trans-unit.source: Could not update the client certificate: {0}
trans-unit.target: Could not update the client certificate: {0}

trans-unit.source: Updating last access time on file {0} failed with {1}
trans-unit.target: Updating last access time on file {0} failed with {1}

trans-unit.source: The repository with the service index '{0}' does not list any trusted certificates.
trans-unit.target: The repository with the service index '{0}' does not list any trusted certificates.

trans-unit.source: A source file was added with an empty path.
trans-unit.target: A source file was added with an empty path.

trans-unit.source: The project directory for the source file '{0}' could not be found.
trans-unit.target: The project directory for the source file '{0}' could not be found.

trans-unit.source: You are running the '{0}' operation with an 'HTTP' source: {1}. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use an HTTP source, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.target: You are running the '{0}' operation with an 'HTTP' source: {1}. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use an HTTP source, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.note: 0 - The command name. Ex. Push/Delete. 1 - server URI.

trans-unit.source: You are running the '{0}' operation with an 'HTTP' source: {1}. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.target: You are running the '{0}' operation with an 'HTTP' source: {1}. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.note: 0 - The command name. Ex. Push/Delete. 1 - server URI.

trans-unit.source: You are running the '{0}' operation with 'HTTP' sources: {1}. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use HTTP sources, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.target: You are running the '{0}' operation with 'HTTP' sources: {1}. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use HTTP sources, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.note: 0 - The command name. Ex. Push/Delete. 1 - list of server URIs

trans-unit.source: The package {0} {1} has a package type {2} that is incompatible with this project.
trans-unit.target: The package {0} {1} has a package type {2} that is incompatible with this project.

trans-unit.source: Specify a nuspec, project.json, or project file to use
trans-unit.target: Specify a nuspec, project.json, or project file to use

trans-unit.source: PackageTargetFallback and AssetTargetFallback cannot be used together. Remove PackageTargetFallback(deprecated) references from the project environment.
trans-unit.target: PackageTargetFallback and AssetTargetFallback cannot be used together. Remove PackageTargetFallback(deprecated) references from the project environment.

trans-unit.source: Invalid certificate information from the service index '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid certificate information from the service index '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Invalid combination of arguments.
trans-unit.target: Invalid combination of arguments.

trans-unit.source: Invalid input '{0}'. The file type was not recognized.
trans-unit.target: Invalid input '{0}'. The file type was not recognized.

trans-unit.source: Invalid input '{0}'. Valid file names are 'packages.config' or 'packages.*.config'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid input '{0}'. Valid file names are 'packages.config' or 'packages.*.config'.

trans-unit.source: Invalid input '{0}'. Valid file names are 'project.json' or '*.project.json'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid input '{0}'. Valid file names are 'project.json' or '*.project.json'.

trans-unit.source: Package version constraints for '{0}' return a version range that is empty.
trans-unit.target: Package version constraints for '{0}' return a version range that is empty.

trans-unit.source: Invalid restore input where RestorePackagesWithLockFile property is set to false but a packages lock file exists at {0}.
trans-unit.target: Invalid restore input where RestorePackagesWithLockFile property is set to false but a packages lock file exists at {0}.

trans-unit.source: Invalid NuGetAuditLevel value '{0}'. Valid values: {1}
trans-unit.target: Invalid NuGetAuditLevel value '{0}'. Valid values: {1}
trans-unit.note: Don't translate 'NuGetAuditLevel' {0} - is the value from the customer's project file {1} is the list of valid values "low, moderate, high, critical" (these should not be translated either)

trans-unit.source: Invalid NuGetAuditMode value '{0}'. Valid values: {1}
trans-unit.target: Invalid NuGetAuditMode value '{0}'. Valid values: {1}
trans-unit.note: Don't translate 'NuGetAuditMode' {0} - is the value from the customer's project file {1} is the list of valid values "direct, all"

trans-unit.source: Invalid NuGetAudit value '{0}'. Valid values: {1}
trans-unit.target: Invalid NuGetAudit value '{0}'. Valid values: {1}
trans-unit.note: Don't translate 'NuGetAudit' {0} - is the value from the customer's project file {1} is the list of valid values "true, false"

trans-unit.source: Invalid project-package combination for {0} {1}. DotnetToolReference project style can only contain references of the DotnetTool type
trans-unit.target: Invalid project-package combination for {0} {1}. DotnetToolReference project style can only contain references of the DotnetTool type

trans-unit.source: The provided SymbolPackageFormat value {0} is invalid. Allowed values : 'snupkg', 'symbols.nupkg'.
trans-unit.target: The provided SymbolPackageFormat value {0} is invalid. Allowed values : 'snupkg', 'symbols.nupkg'.
trans-unit.note: Do not localize snupkg and symbols.nupkg

trans-unit.source: Failed to build package because of an unsupported targetFramework value on '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Failed to build package because of an unsupported targetFramework value on '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value for WindowsTargetPlatformMinVersion: {0}
trans-unit.target: Invalid value for WindowsTargetPlatformMinVersion: {0}

trans-unit.source: Source parameter was not specified.
trans-unit.target: Source parameter was not specified.

trans-unit.source: {0} contains more than one path
trans-unit.target: {0} contains more than one path

trans-unit.source: signatureValidationMode is set to require, so packages are allowed only if signed by trusted signers; however, no trusted signers were specified.
trans-unit.target: signatureValidationMode is set to require, so packages are allowed only if signed by trusted signers; however, no trusted signers were specified.

trans-unit.source: The package signature did not match any of the allowed certificate fingerprints.
trans-unit.target: The package signature did not match any of the allowed certificate fingerprints.

trans-unit.source: This package is signed but not by a trusted signer.
trans-unit.target: This package is signed but not by a trusted signer.

trans-unit.source: Unable to find package {0}. No packages exist with this id in source(s): {1}
trans-unit.target: Unable to find package {0}. No packages exist with this id in source(s): {1}

trans-unit.source: Unable to find package {0} with version {1}
trans-unit.target: Unable to find package {0} with version {1}

trans-unit.source: No signature to be trusted was specified for the package '{0}'. Specify either Author or Repository.
trans-unit.target: No signature to be trusted was specified for the package '{0}'. Specify either Author or Repository.

trans-unit.source: Unable to get package sources information.
trans-unit.target: Unable to get package sources information.

trans-unit.source: Unable to find a stable package {0} with version {1}
trans-unit.target: Unable to find a stable package {0} with version {1}

trans-unit.source: '{0}' is not a supported hash algorithm.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' is not a supported hash algorithm.

trans-unit.source: Failed to build package. {0}
trans-unit.target: Failed to build package. {0}

trans-unit.source: Failed to build package. Ensure '{0}' includes assembly files. For help on building symbols package, visit {1}.
trans-unit.target: Failed to build package. Ensure '{0}' includes assembly files. For help on building symbols package, visit {1}.

trans-unit.source: Failed to build package. Ensure '{0}' includes source and symbol files. For help on building symbols package, visit {1}.
trans-unit.target: Failed to build package. Ensure '{0}' includes source and symbol files. For help on building symbols package, visit {1}.

trans-unit.source: Package '{0}' does not have an exact version like '[1.0.0]'. Only exact versions are allowed with PackageDownload.
trans-unit.target: Package '{0}' does not have an exact version like '[1.0.0]'. Only exact versions are allowed with PackageDownload.
trans-unit.note: 0 - The package that does not have an exact version. Do not translate 'PackageDownload'.

trans-unit.source: Package '{0} {1}' does not have an exact version like '[1.0.0]'. Only exact versions are allowed with PackageDownload.
trans-unit.target: Package '{0} {1}' does not have an exact version like '[1.0.0]'. Only exact versions are allowed with PackageDownload.
trans-unit.note: 0 - The package that does not have an exact version. Do not translate 'PackageDownload'. 1 - the version string that's not exact.

trans-unit.source: The package is not signed.
trans-unit.target: The package is not signed.

trans-unit.source: The following PackageReference item(s) do not have a version specified: {0}
trans-unit.target: The following PackageReference item(s) do not have a version specified: {0}

trans-unit.source: Package content hash validation failed for {0}. The package is different than the last restore.
trans-unit.target: Package content hash validation failed for {0}. The package is different than the last restore.

trans-unit.source: Platform version is not present for one or more target frameworks, even though they have specified a platform: {0}
trans-unit.target: Platform version is not present for one or more target frameworks, even though they have specified a platform: {0}
trans-unit.note: 0 - comma-separated list of TFMs missing a platform version

trans-unit.source: Unable to find project '{0}'. Check that the project reference is valid and that the project file exists.
trans-unit.target: Unable to find project '{0}'. Check that the project reference is valid and that the project file exists.

trans-unit.source: Managing packages with project.json is deprecated. Migrate to PackageReference.
trans-unit.target: Managing packages with project.json is deprecated. Migrate to PackageReference.

trans-unit.source: The runtime.json specified in the project '{0}' could not be parsed. {1}
trans-unit.target: The runtime.json specified in the project '{0}' could not be parsed. {1}
trans-unit.note: 0 - runtime.json path, 1 - Additional Message, Please do not localize 'runtime.json'.

trans-unit.source: The runtime.json specified in the project '{0}' could not be found.
trans-unit.target: The runtime.json specified in the project '{0}' could not be found.
trans-unit.note: 0 - runtime.json path, Please do not localize 'runtime.json'

trans-unit.source: Project {0} must have a single package reference(s).
trans-unit.target: Project {0} must have a single package reference(s).

trans-unit.source: Property '{0}' should not be null or empty.
trans-unit.target: Property '{0}' should not be null or empty.

trans-unit.source: Unable to add trusted repository. The package is not repository signed or countersigned.
trans-unit.target: Unable to add trusted repository. The package is not repository signed or countersigned.

trans-unit.source: The packages lock file is inconsistent with the project dependencies so restore can't be run in locked mode. Disable the RestoreLockedMode MSBuild property or pass an explicit --force-evaluate option to run restore to update the lock file.
trans-unit.target: The packages lock file is inconsistent with the project dependencies so restore can't be run in locked mode. Disable the RestoreLockedMode MSBuild property or pass an explicit --force-evaluate option to run restore to update the lock file.

trans-unit.source: PackageReference {0} will not be pruned. Consider removing this package from your dependencies, as it is likely unnecessary.
trans-unit.target: PackageReference {0} will not be pruned. Consider removing this package from your dependencies, as it is likely unnecessary.

trans-unit.source: A ProjectReference cannot be pruned, {0}.
trans-unit.target: A ProjectReference cannot be pruned, {0}.

trans-unit.source: The repository service index '{0}' is not a valid HTTPS url.
trans-unit.target: The repository service index '{0}' is not a valid HTTPS url.

trans-unit.source: Invalid tools package {0} {1}. Tools packages cannot contain more than one PackageType.
trans-unit.target: Invalid tools package {0} {1}. Tools packages cannot contain more than one PackageType.

trans-unit.source: A trusted author cannot have owners.
trans-unit.target: A trusted author cannot have owners.

trans-unit.source: A trusted repository with the service index '{0}' already exists.
trans-unit.target: A trusted repository with the service index '{0}' already exists.

trans-unit.source: A trusted repository '{0}' does not exist.
trans-unit.target: A trusted repository '{0}' does not exist.

trans-unit.source: A trusted signer '{0}' already exists.
trans-unit.target: A trusted signer '{0}' already exists.

trans-unit.source: Unable to find project information for '{0}'. If you are using Visual Studio, this may be because the project is unloaded or not part of the current solution so run a restore from the command-line. Otherwise, the project file may be invalid or missing targets required for restore.
trans-unit.target: Unable to find project information for '{0}'. If you are using Visual Studio, this may be because the project is unloaded or not part of the current solution so run a restore from the command-line. Otherwise, the project file may be invalid or missing targets required for restore.

trans-unit.source: No build found in {0}. Use the -Build option or build the project.
trans-unit.target: No build found in {0}. Use the -Build option or build the project.

trans-unit.source: The folder '{0}' does not contain a project to restore.
trans-unit.target: The folder '{0}' does not contain a project to restore.

trans-unit.source: Unable to sign package.
trans-unit.target: Unable to sign package.

trans-unit.source: Source '{0}' does not exist or cannot be retrived.
trans-unit.target: Source '{0}' does not exist or cannot be retrived.

trans-unit.source: Package '{0}' specifies an invalid build action '{1}' for file '{2}'.
trans-unit.target: Package '{0}' specifies an invalid build action '{1}' for file '{2}'.

trans-unit.target: Cannot determine client certificate store type

trans-unit.source: The find by search type '{0}' is not recognized.
trans-unit.target: The find by search type '{0}' is not recognized.

trans-unit.source: The store location '{0}' is not recognized.
trans-unit.target: The store location '{0}' is not recognized.

trans-unit.source: The source name '{0}' is not recognized.
trans-unit.target: The source name '{0}' is not recognized.

trans-unit.source: The trust target '{0}' is unsupported.
trans-unit.target: The trust target '{0}' is unsupported.

trans-unit.source: Error occurred while getting package vulnerability data: {0}
trans-unit.target: Error occurred while getting package vulnerability data: {0}

trans-unit.source: Unable to output resolved nuspec file because it would overwrite the original at '{0}'
trans-unit.target: Unable to output resolved nuspec file because it would overwrite the original at '{0}'

trans-unit.source: Invalid input '{0}'. XProj support has been removed. Support for XProj and standalone project.json files has been removed, to continue working with legacy projects use NuGet 3.5.x from https://nuget.org/downloads
trans-unit.target: Invalid input '{0}'. XProj support has been removed. Support for XProj and standalone project.json files has been removed, to continue working with legacy projects use NuGet 3.5.x from https://nuget.org/downloads

trans-unit.source: Failed to build '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Failed to build '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: File '{0}' is not added because the package already contains file '{1}'
trans-unit.target: File '{0}' is not added because the package already contains file '{1}'

trans-unit.source: Found {0} version(s) in {1} [ Nearest version: {2} ]
trans-unit.target: Found {0} version(s) in {1} [ Nearest version: {2} ]

trans-unit.source: Found {0} version(s) in {1}
trans-unit.target: Found {0} version(s) in {1}

trans-unit.source: Invalid restore input. {0}
trans-unit.target: Invalid restore input. {0}
trans-unit.note: 0 is an error message specific to the validation failure.

trans-unit.source: Invalid restore input. {0} Input files: {1}.
trans-unit.target: Invalid restore input. {0} Input files: {1}.
trans-unit.note: 0 is an error message specific to the validation failure. 1 is a list of file paths.

trans-unit.source: The specified source '{0}' is invalid. Provide a valid source.
trans-unit.target: The specified source '{0}' is invalid. Provide a valid source.

trans-unit.source: The {0} value: `{1}` is invalid. Valid example: `{2}`
trans-unit.target: The {0} value: `{1}` is invalid. Valid example: `{2}`
trans-unit.note: {0} - is the attribute {1} is the invalid value of the attribute. {2} a valid attriibute value example

trans-unit.source: One or more invalid frameworks were detected.
trans-unit.target: One or more invalid frameworks were detected.

trans-unit.source: Clearing local resources failed: Unable to delete one or more files.
trans-unit.target: Clearing local resources failed: Unable to delete one or more files.

trans-unit.source: Local resources cleared.
trans-unit.target: Local resources cleared.

trans-unit.source: Clearing NuGet global packages folder: {0}
trans-unit.target: Clearing NuGet global packages folder: {0}

trans-unit.source: Clearing NuGet HTTP cache: {0}
trans-unit.target: Clearing NuGet HTTP cache: {0}

trans-unit.source: Clearing NuGet plugins cache: {0}
trans-unit.target: Clearing NuGet plugins cache: {0}

trans-unit.source: Clearing NuGet Temp cache: {0}
trans-unit.target: Clearing NuGet Temp cache: {0}

trans-unit.source: Failed to delete '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Failed to delete '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: usage: NuGet locals <all | http-cache | global-packages | temp | plugins-cache> [--clear | -c | --list | -l] For more information, visit https://docs.nuget.org/docs/reference/command-line-reference
trans-unit.target: usage: NuGet locals <all | http-cache | global-packages | temp | plugins-cache> [--clear | -c | --list | -l] For more information, visit https://docs.nuget.org/docs/reference/command-line-reference

trans-unit.source: An invalid local resource name was provided. Provide one of the following values: http-cache, temp, global-packages, all.
trans-unit.target: An invalid local resource name was provided. Provide one of the following values: http-cache, temp, global-packages, all.

trans-unit.source: The location of local resource '{0}' is undefined.
trans-unit.target: The location of local resource '{0}' is undefined.

trans-unit.source: Local resources partially cleared.
trans-unit.target: Local resources partially cleared.

trans-unit.source: All projects are up-to-date for restore.
trans-unit.target: All projects are up-to-date for restore.

trans-unit.source: The expected assets file for {0} does not exist, no-op is not possible. Continuing restore.
trans-unit.target: The expected assets file for {0} does not exist, no-op is not possible. Continuing restore.

trans-unit.source: Detected package downgrade: {0} from {1} to centrally defined {2}. Update the centrally managed package version to a higher version.
trans-unit.target: Detected package downgrade: {0} from {1} to centrally defined {2}. Update the centrally managed package version to a higher version.
trans-unit.note: {0} is package id, {1} is the package version, {2} is the downgraded package version.

trans-unit.source: Committing restore...
trans-unit.target: Committing restore...

trans-unit.source: NuGet Config files used:
trans-unit.target: NuGet Config files used:

trans-unit.source: The package {0} was converted to original case in the packages directory.
trans-unit.target: The package {0} was converted to original case in the packages directory.

trans-unit.source: Cycle detected.
trans-unit.target: Cycle detected.

trans-unit.source: Dependency specified was {0} {1} but ended up with {2} {3}.
trans-unit.target: Dependency specified was {0} {1} but ended up with {2} {3}.

trans-unit.source: Detected package downgrade: {0} from {1} to {2}. Reference the package directly from the project to select a different version.
trans-unit.target: Detected package downgrade: {0} from {1} to {2}. Reference the package directly from the project to select a different version.
trans-unit.note: {0}: package id {1}: requested version {2}: resolved version

trans-unit.source: Errors in {0}
trans-unit.target: Errors in {0}

trans-unit.source: Feeds used:
trans-unit.target: Feeds used:

trans-unit.note: 0 - framework short name, 1 - System.FrameworkName, 2 - Runtime ID

trans-unit.source: Generating MSBuild file {0}.
trans-unit.target: Generating MSBuild file {0}.

trans-unit.source: Package '{0}' was restored using '{1}' instead of the project target framework '{2}'. This package may not be fully compatible with your project.
trans-unit.target: Package '{0}' was restored using '{1}' instead of the project target framework '{2}'. This package may not be fully compatible with your project.

trans-unit.source: Installed:
trans-unit.target: Installed:

trans-unit.source: {0} package(s) to {1}
trans-unit.target: {0} package(s) to {1}

trans-unit.source: The lock file for {0} at location {1} does not exist, no-op is not possible. Continuing restore.
trans-unit.target: The lock file for {0} at location {1} does not exist, no-op is not possible. Continuing restore.

trans-unit.source: Merging in runtimes defined in {0}.
trans-unit.target: Merging in runtimes defined in {0}.

trans-unit.source: {0} {1} provides a compile-time reference assembly for {2} on {3}, but there is no compatible run-time assembly.
trans-unit.target: {0} {1} provides a compile-time reference assembly for {2} on {3}, but there is no compatible run-time assembly.

trans-unit.source: {0} {1} provides a compile-time reference assembly for {2} on {3}, but there is no run-time assembly compatible with {4}.
trans-unit.target: {0} {1} provides a compile-time reference assembly for {2} on {3}, but there is no run-time assembly compatible with {4}.

trans-unit.source: Not all packages are on disk for: {0}
trans-unit.target: Not all packages are on disk for: {0}

trans-unit.source: Added file '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Added file '{0}'.

trans-unit.target: Attempting to build symbols package for '{0}'.

trans-unit.target: Install {0} to output path '{1}'

trans-unit.source: Successfully created package '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Successfully created package '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Package content hash validation failed for {0}. Expected: {1} Actual: {2}
trans-unit.target: Package content hash validation failed for {0}. Expected: {1} Actual: {2}
trans-unit.note: 0 - package ID, 1 - expected Sha, 2 - actual sha

trans-unit.source: Package {0} {1} is not compatible with {2}.
trans-unit.target: Package {0} {1} is not compatible with {2}.

trans-unit.source: Package {0} {1} does not support any target frameworks.
trans-unit.target: Package {0} {1} does not support any target frameworks.

trans-unit.target: Package {0} {1} supports:

trans-unit.source: All packages and projects are compatible with {0}.
trans-unit.target: All packages and projects are compatible with {0}.

trans-unit.target: The project {0} does not specify any target frameworks in {1}.

trans-unit.source: Project {0} is not compatible with {1}.
trans-unit.target: Project {0} is not compatible with {1}.

trans-unit.source: Project {0} does not support any target frameworks.
trans-unit.target: Project {0} does not support any target frameworks.

trans-unit.source: Project {0} supports:
trans-unit.target: Project {0} supports:

trans-unit.source: {0} of {1} projects are up-to-date for restore.
trans-unit.target: {0} of {1} projects are up-to-date for restore.
trans-unit.note: 0 - number of projects that were up-to-date 1 - Total number of projects

trans-unit.source: The props file for {0} at location {1} does not exist, no-op is not possible. Continuing restore.
trans-unit.target: The props file for {0} at location {1} does not exist, no-op is not possible. Continuing restore.

trans-unit.source: Reading project file {0}.
trans-unit.target: Reading project file {0}.

trans-unit.source: Unable to satisfy conflicting requests for '{0}': {1} Framework: {2}
trans-unit.target: Unable to satisfy conflicting requests for '{0}': {1} Framework: {2}
trans-unit.note: 0 - package id, 1 - comma delimited list of conflicts, 2 - framework

trans-unit.source: Resolving conflicts for {0}...
trans-unit.target: Resolving conflicts for {0}...

trans-unit.source: Restored {0} (in {1}).
trans-unit.target: Restored {0} (in {1}).
trans-unit.note: {0} is the path to the project file. {1} is the restore duration.

trans-unit.source: Restored {0} (in {1}).
trans-unit.target: Restored {0} (in {1}).

trans-unit.source: Failed to restore {0} (in {1}).
trans-unit.target: Failed to restore {0} (in {1}).
trans-unit.note: {0} is the path to the project file. {1} is the restore duration.

trans-unit.source: Failed to restore {0} (in {1}).
trans-unit.target: Failed to restore {0} (in {1}).
trans-unit.note: {0} is the path to the project file. {1} is the restore duration.

trans-unit.source: The restore inputs for '{0}' have changed. Continuing restore.
trans-unit.target: The restore inputs for '{0}' have changed. Continuing restore.

trans-unit.source: The restore inputs for '{0}' have not changed. No further actions are required to complete the restore.
trans-unit.target: The restore inputs for '{0}' have not changed. No further actions are required to complete the restore.

trans-unit.target: Restoring packages for {0}...

trans-unit.target: Running non-parallel restore.

trans-unit.source: Running restore with {0} concurrent jobs.
trans-unit.target: Running restore with {0} concurrent jobs.

trans-unit.target: Scanning packages for runtime.json files...

trans-unit.target: Assets file has not changed. Skipping assets file writing. Path: {0}

trans-unit.target: No-Op restore. The cache will not be updated. Path: {0}

trans-unit.target: Skipping the lock file regeneration for '{0}'.

trans-unit.target: PackageSourceMapping is enabled, the following source(s) were not considered: {0}.

trans-unit.target: There are no client certificates.

trans-unit.target: No target frameworks specified.

trans-unit.target: UAP projects must contain exactly one target framework.

trans-unit.target: Restore request does not contain any projects to restore.

trans-unit.target: Certificate fingerprint(s):

trans-unit.target: Trusted owners: {0}

trans-unit.source: Content hash: {0}
trans-unit.target: Content hash: {0}

trans-unit.source: Package signature validation failed.
trans-unit.target: Package signature validation failed.

trans-unit.source: Finished with {0} errors and {1} warnings.
trans-unit.target: Finished with {0} errors and {1} warnings.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of errors produced and {1} is the number of warnings.

trans-unit.source: Package signature validation command is not supported on this platform.
trans-unit.target: Package signature validation command is not supported on this platform.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' is not a valid package file.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' is not a valid package file.

trans-unit.source: Successfully verified package '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Successfully verified package '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Verification type not supported. Use only one of the following supported types: -All, -Signatures
trans-unit.target: Verification type not supported. Use only one of the following supported types: -All, -Signatures

trans-unit.source: Verifying {0}
trans-unit.target: Verifying {0}
trans-unit.note: {0} should be the package identity of the package to verify

trans-unit.source: critical
trans-unit.target: critical
trans-unit.note: As in "This package has a critical severity vulnerability"

trans-unit.source: high
trans-unit.target: high
trans-unit.note: As in "This package has a high severity vulnerability"

trans-unit.source: low
trans-unit.target: low
trans-unit.note: As in "This package has a low severity vulnerability"

trans-unit.source: moderate
trans-unit.target: moderate
trans-unit.note: As in "This package has a moderate severity vulnerability"

trans-unit.source: unknown
trans-unit.target: unknown
trans-unit.note: As in "This package has a unknown severity vulnerability"

trans-unit.source: Warning As Error: {0}
trans-unit.target: Warning As Error: {0}

trans-unit.source: Audit source '{0}' did not provide any vulnerability data.
trans-unit.target: Audit source '{0}' did not provide any vulnerability data.

trans-unit.source: There are {0} package sources defined in your configuration. When using central package management, please map your package sources with package source mapping (https://aka.ms/nuget-package-source-mapping) or specify a single package source. The following sources are defined: {1}
trans-unit.target: There are {0} package sources defined in your configuration. When using central package management, please map your package sources with package source mapping (https://aka.ms/nuget-package-source-mapping) or specify a single package source. The following sources are defined: {1}
trans-unit.note: 0 - The number of package sources, 1 - The URL of the package sources, comma separated.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' key already exists in Properties collection. Overriding value.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' key already exists in Properties collection. Overriding value.

trans-unit.source: File '{0}' was not added to the package. Files and folders starting with '.' or ending with '.nupkg' are excluded by default. To include this file, use -NoDefaultExcludes from the commandline
trans-unit.target: File '{0}' was not added to the package. Files and folders starting with '.' or ending with '.nupkg' are excluded by default. To include this file, use -NoDefaultExcludes from the commandline

trans-unit.source: You are running the '{0}' operation with an 'HTTP' source, '{1}'. Non-HTTPS access will be removed in a future version. Consider migrating to an 'HTTPS' source.
trans-unit.target: You are running the '{0}' operation with an 'HTTP' source, '{1}'. Non-HTTPS access will be removed in a future version. Consider migrating to an 'HTTPS' source.
trans-unit.note: 0 - The command name. Ex. Push/Delete. 1 - server URI.

trans-unit.source: The following is a 'Non-HTTPS' source: {0} NuGet requires HTTPS sources. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.target: The following is a 'Non-HTTPS' source: {0} NuGet requires HTTPS sources. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.

trans-unit.source: The following are 'Non-HTTPS' sources: {0} NuGet requires HTTPS sources. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.target: The following are 'Non-HTTPS' sources: {0} NuGet requires HTTPS sources. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.

trans-unit.source: {0} depends on {1} but {2} was not found. {3} was resolved instead.
trans-unit.target: {0} depends on {1} but {2} was not found. {3} was resolved instead.

trans-unit.source: {0} does not provide an inclusive lower bound for dependency {1}. {2} was resolved instead.
trans-unit.target: {0} does not provide an inclusive lower bound for dependency {1}. {2} was resolved instead.

trans-unit.source: Package '{0}' {1} has a known {2} severity vulnerability, {3}
trans-unit.target: Package '{0}' {1} has a known {2} severity vulnerability, {3}
trans-unit.note: {0} - package id {1} - package version {2} - severity, for example low, moderate, high, or critical {3} - URL for more info on the known vulnerability

trans-unit.source: Project dependency {0} does not contain an inclusive lower bound. Include a lower bound in the dependency version to ensure consistent restore results.
trans-unit.target: Project dependency {0} does not contain an inclusive lower bound. Include a lower bound in the dependency version to ensure consistent restore results.

trans-unit.source: Project dependency '{0}' does not specify a version. Include a version for the dependency to ensure consistent restore results.
trans-unit.target: Project dependency '{0}' does not specify a version. Include a version for the dependency to ensure consistent restore results.

trans-unit.source: Detected package version outside of dependency constraint: {0} requires {1} but version {2} was resolved.
trans-unit.target: Detected package version outside of dependency constraint: {0} requires {1} but version {2} was resolved.
